verses.text: Tua ciangin Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Hih lai-ah kei-a' dingin biakna tau sagih hong bawlsak in la, kei-a' dingin bawngtal sagih leh tuutal sagih hong pia in,” a ci hi
Balaam' gen bangin Balak gamta a, Balak leh Balaam in biakna tau simah bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat ciat a pia uh hi

Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Na meihal biakna kiangah na ding in; kei ka va pai ding hi. Kei hong dawn dingin Topa hong pai khading hi. Amah in kei hong lah khempeuh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a sang mual dawn pawn khatah amah a paito hi.
Pasian in Balaam na dawn hi. Balaam in ama kiangah, “Biakna tau sagih ka bawl khin a, biakna tau simah bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat ciat ka pia hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Balaam kiangah thu gen a, “Balak kiangah ciahkikin hih bangin na gen ding hi,” a ci hi
Balak kiangah a ciahkik ciangin amah leh Moab uliante khempeuh ama meihal biakna gei-ah na ding uh hi
Balaam in a thugen ding teng genin: “Aram panin Balak in kei hong paipih a, nisuahna mualte panin Moab kumpipa in kei hong paipih hi: ‘Hong pai in, Israel mite mawhsak in!’ hong ci hi
Pasian' samsiat loh mite bangci samsiat ding ka hi hiam? Topa' mawhsak loh mite bangci mawhsak ding ka hi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh mual dawn panin amaute ka mu a, mual neute panin amaute ka en hi. En in, a tangten' mite, minamte lakah a kihel lote
Leivui zahin a tam Jakob mite, kua in a mal simzo ding a, Israel mi phazah a mal simzo ding ahi hiam? Mi thumanpa' sihna bangin hong sisak in la, ka mailam thu ama-a' bang hisak in,!” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Kei bang hong cih na hi hiam? Ka galte a samsia dingin nang kong sam a, ahi zongin amaute bangmah cihloin, amaute thupha na pia zawsop hi,” a ci hi
Amah in, “ Topa in ka gen dingin hong sawl thu, donlo ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ciangin Balak in ama kiangah, “Amaute na muh theihna ding mun dangah kei hong zui in. Amaute a madawk teng bek na mu ding a, a vekpi-in na mu kei ding hi. Tua ciangin tua lai panin amaute nong samsiatsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in Zofim gamlak, Pisgah mual dawnah amah paipihin, biakna tau sagih bawl a, biakna tau simah bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat ciat a pia hi
Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Hua lamah Topa tawh ka va kituah kalun na meihal biakna gei hih lai-ah na ding in,” a ci hi
Topa in Balaam na dawnin ama kiangah, “Balak kiangah ciahkikin hih bangin thu na gen ding hi” a ci hi
Balak kiangah a paikik ciangin a meihal biakna gei-ah amah na ding a, Moab uliante tawh na om uh hi. Balak in ama kiangah, “ Topa in bang hong gen ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Balaam in a thugen ding teng genin: “Balak aw, ka thugen ding za in. Zippor' tapa aw, ka thu ngai in
A zuau dingin Pasian pen mihing hilo a, a kisik dingin mihing' tapa hilo hi. Amah in gen khin hi; a gen bangin hihlo ding ahi hiam? Amah in ci khin hi; a cih bangin tungsaklo ding ahi hiam
En in, thupha piak ding thu ka ngah hi. Amah in thupha pia khin a, ke'n ka kheelkik thei kei hi
Amah in Jakob mite tungah mawhna mulo a, Israel mite tungah gamtatsiatna mulo hi. Topa amau' Pasian, amaute tawh om a, kumpipa phatna awging amaute' lakah om hi
Pasian in Egypt panin amaute paikhiatpih a, amaute in gamsial tha bang hatna nei uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Jakob mite a kibumna ding omlo a, Israel mite' langkhatah aisaan ding omlo hi. Tu-in Israel-te tawh kisai-in, ‘Pasian' sepna en un,’ kici ding hi
En un, hua mite! Humpinelkai bangin thoto a, humpinelkai bangin kaangto hi. A an a nek mateng, amaute' si a dawn mateng, lumsuklo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Amaute samsia peuhmah kei in la, thupha zong pia peuhmah kei in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Balaam in Balak kiangah, “‘ Topa' cih khempeuh keimah in ka hih ding hi,’ hong ci hilo ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Tu-in hong pai in; mun dangah kong paipih ding hi. Tua lai panin amaute nong samsiatsakna ding Pasian in hong lungkimpih khading hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Balak in sehnel gam a kimuh sukna Peor mual dawnah Balaam paipih hi
Tua ciangin Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Hih lai-ah kei-a' dingin biakna tau sagih hong bawlsak in la, bawngtal sagih leh tuutal sagih hih lai-ah hong pia in,” a ci hi
Balaam' cih bangin Balak in hih a, biakna tau simah bawngtal khat leh tuutal khat ciat a pia hi.
